languages.text: "Вы так и не поняли, наследни{mf|к|ца}? Я никогда не сдаюсь. Вольные Торговцы идут до конца, пока не сгинут у чуждых звезд".
languages.translation_comment: Себериан сует руку в генозамок и переходим к WC_NoWarrant_cs
Себериан сует руку в генозамок и переходим к WC_NoWarrant_cs

languages.text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."
languages.original_text: "Вы так и не поняли, наследни{mf|к|ца}? Я никогда не сдаюсь. Вольные Торговцы идут до конца, пока не сгинут у чуждых звезд".

traits.locale_text: "Have you still not understood, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders go all the way, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."
"Have you still not understood, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders go all the way, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."
"Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."
"Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."
"Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

languages.text: "Habt Ihr das noch nicht erkannt, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}? Ich gebe niemals auf. Freihändler kämpfen stets, bis sie unter unbekannten Sternen den Tod finden."
languages.original_text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr das noch nicht erkannt, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}? Ich gebe niemals auf. Freihändler kämpfen stets, bis sie unter unbekannten Sternen den Tod finden."

languages.text: « Vous n'avez donc toujours pas compris, mon {mf|héritier|héritière} ? Je n'abandonne jamais. Un libre-marchand combat toujours jusqu'au bout, jusqu'à mourir entouré par des étoiles inconnues. »
languages.original_text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'avez donc toujours pas compris, mon {mf|héritier|héritière} ? Je n'abandonne jamais. Un libre-marchand combat toujours jusqu'au bout, jusqu'à mourir entouré par des étoiles inconnues. »

languages.text: «¿Aún no se ha dado cuenta, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}? Yo nunca me rindo. Un Comerciante Independiente lucha hasta el final, siempre, hasta su muerte entre estrellas desconocidas».
languages.original_text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

traits.locale_text: «¿Aún no se ha dado cuenta, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}? Yo nunca me rindo. Un Comerciante Independiente lucha hasta el final, siempre, hasta su muerte entre estrellas desconocidas».

languages.text: "Hâlâ anlamadın mı vârisim? Ben asla pes etmem. Hür Tacirler, bilinmeyen yıldızların arasında yok olana dek her zaman sonuna kadar savaşır."
languages.original_text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

traits.locale_text: "Hâlâ anlamadın mı vârisim? Ben asla pes etmem. Hür Tacirler, bilinmeyen yıldızların arasında yok olana dek her zaman sonuna kadar savaşır."

languages.text: “你还不明白吗，我的继承人？我绝不会放弃。行商浪人永远都会战斗到最后一刻，直至消殒在无人知晓的群星之中。”
languages.original_text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

traits.locale_text: “你还不明白吗，我的继承人？我绝不会放弃。行商浪人永远都会战斗到最后一刻，直至消殒在无人知晓的群星之中。”

languages.text: 「まだ気づいていないのですか、私の後継者よ？私は決して諦めない。ならず者トレーダーは、星々を知らぬ星々で滅びるまで、最後まで戦い続けるのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Haven't you realised yet, my heir? I never give up. Rogue Traders fight to the end, always, until they perish amid stars unknown."

traits.locale_text: 「まだ気づいていないのですか、私の後継者よ？私は決して諦めない。ならず者トレーダーは、星々を知らぬ星々で滅びるまで、最後まで戦い続けるのだ。」
